non_destructive_scope: Additive Phase Zero framework and blueprint file only; no production SkillPackages, routes, schemas, renderers, progress systems, dashboards, curriculum indexes, or UI changed.
status_label: All counts, thresholds, classifications, and rules are provisional, configurable, versioned, subject to expert review, and subject to future empirical calibration before validation claims.

baseline.purpose: Initial broad screening for one selected grade and one selected subject using selected-grade SkillPackages only, with targeted prerequisite confirmation allowed only after a specific weakness is found.
prohibited_claims: full grade mastery unless all later evidence requirements are met
baseline.package_domain_coverage: Every critical package in the selected grade/subject; supporting packages sampled when session length permits.
baseline.expected_item_count_range: provisional configurable 18-30 for Math, 20-34 for English depending on grade and reading load
baseline.session_length_guidance: short enough for age; split if the child is fatigued or continuous-session maximum is reached
baseline.break_resume_rules: breaks allowed at section/package boundaries; resume with equivalent remaining blueprint cells without reusing exposed items
baseline.minimum_evidence_requirements: at least one valid response per critical package and at least two per critical domain where item supply permits
baseline.scoring_role: summarize screening evidence and flag sufficiency; does not operate as secure final scoring in Phase Zero
baseline.mastery_decision_role: no standalone mastery certification except future configured rules requiring full evidence
baseline.reassessment_rules: after scoring, targeted prerequisite confirmation may be scheduled only for identified weaknesses
baseline.audio_accessibility_behavior: Read Question/Listen available where appropriate; audio is meaning-equivalent and never answer-revealing
baseline.parent_recommendations: may trigger instructional recommendations, capped and caveated, not placement or diagnosis

progress_monitoring.purpose: Brief trend evidence for recently taught skill clusters.
progress_monitoring.package_domain_coverage: Recently taught package cluster plus at least one cumulative retention item.
progress_monitoring.expected_item_count_range: provisional configurable 4-8 items per recently taught skill cluster
progress_monitoring.session_length_guidance: very short session; usually one cluster at a time
progress_monitoring.break_resume_rules: breaks allowed; resumed forms avoid repeating identical prior items
progress_monitoring.minimum_evidence_requirements: valid responses for the cluster and one cumulative item when appropriate
progress_monitoring.mastery_decision_role: no whole-grade mastery decision; may inform readiness for reassessment
progress_monitoring.reassessment_rules: use different or equivalent items from prior assessments
progress_monitoring.audio_accessibility_behavior: accommodations allowed and recorded without penalty
progress_monitoring.parent_recommendations: may update short-term instructional recommendations only

strand_reassessment.purpose: Confirm whether a related domain/strand has improved after instruction and practice.
strand_reassessment.package_domain_coverage: Related SkillPackages within one domain or tightly connected strand.
strand_reassessment.session_length_guidance: single-domain session with optional split for longer reading/writing work
strand_reassessment.break_resume_rules: breaks at natural item-set boundaries; resume remaining direct/application/transfer cells
strand_reassessment.minimum_evidence_requirements: direct skill, application, transfer, and prerequisite evidence where relevant
strand_reassessment.mastery_decision_role: may support domain-level status only under future configured rules
strand_reassessment.reassessment_rules: requires enough new/equivalent evidence and cannot rely on near-duplicate practice items
strand_reassessment.audio_accessibility_behavior: meaning-equivalent audio; constructed responses keep the same scoring expectations

grade_mastery.purpose: Evaluate broad current-grade mastery after sufficient instruction and domain evidence.
allowed_claims: Mastered/Developing/Needs Support/Not Enough Evidence under future configured rules
grade_mastery.package_domain_coverage: All critical grade domains and all critical packages represented.
grade_mastery.expected_item_count_range: provisional configurable 24-42 items depending on subject and grade
grade_mastery.session_length_guidance: may be split across sittings; avoid exceeding age-appropriate continuous maximum
grade_mastery.break_resume_rules: planned breaks allowed between domains; resume with uncompleted blueprint cells
grade_mastery.minimum_evidence_requirements: valid evidence in every critical domain, multiple formats where available, and no unresolved critical prerequisite
grade_mastery.scoring_role: aggregates secure evidence under later scoring services
grade_mastery.mastery_decision_role: provisional grade-readiness decision allowed only when all evidence requirements are met
grade_mastery.reassessment_rules: weak critical domains require targeted reassessment; strong domains cannot compensate for critical gaps
grade_mastery.audio_accessibility_behavior: accommodations recorded but not penalized; audio cannot change construct or reveal answer
grade_mastery.parent_recommendations: may trigger recommendations if labeled instructional and provisional
grade_mastery.scored_evidence_status_rule: Only validated_operational items may contribute scored evidence for mastery/readiness decisions; candidate and field_test items are excluded from scored evidence.

cumulative_mixed.purpose: Confirm retention, skill selection, and transfer without lesson/package labels.
cumulative_mixed.package_domain_coverage: Mixed current-grade skills, prerequisite-retention checks when warranted, and unfamiliar transfer items.
cumulative_mixed.session_length_guidance: moderate mixed session; split if text load is high
cumulative_mixed.break_resume_rules: breaks allowed without showing package labels; resume with mixed unexposed items
cumulative_mixed.minimum_evidence_requirements: evidence across critical domains plus retention and transfer cells
cumulative_mixed.mastery_decision_role: does not by itself certify mastery; supports readiness gate maintenance
cumulative_mixed.reassessment_rules: weak retention/transfer cells trigger targeted review, not broad regression labels
cumulative_mixed.audio_accessibility_behavior: reduced cueing; audio permitted only if it does not reveal skill choice
cumulative_mixed.parent_recommendations: may refine instructional plan after current-grade mastery evidence exists
cumulative_mixed.scored_evidence_status_rule: Only validated_operational items may contribute scored evidence for mastery/readiness decisions; candidate and field_test items are excluded from scored evidence.

next_grade_readiness.purpose: After current-grade mastery, sample the next grade to identify starting packages.
next_grade_readiness.package_domain_coverage: Small sample of next-grade critical and entry packages; Grade 6 screener requires later Grade 7 inventory before operational use.
next_grade_readiness.session_length_guidance: short and exploratory; no high-stakes pressure
next_grade_readiness.break_resume_rules: breaks allowed; incomplete screener produces Not Enough Evidence starting plan
next_grade_readiness.minimum_evidence_requirements: domain-specific entry evidence, not full next-grade coverage
next_grade_readiness.mastery_decision_role: not allowed to certify next-grade mastery
next_grade_readiness.reassessment_rules: uneven domains lead to domain-specific starting supports
next_grade_readiness.audio_accessibility_behavior: same accommodations as current grade; reading/audio must match construct
next_grade_readiness.parent_recommendations: may trigger next-grade starting recommendations only after current-grade mastery gate
next_grade_readiness.scored_evidence_status_rule: Only validated_operational items may contribute scored evidence for mastery/readiness decisions; candidate and field_test items are excluded from scored evidence.

decision_rule_posture: Framework-level only. Exact thresholds are not implemented and must be configurable, versioned, expert-reviewed, calibrated with real data, and subjected to standard setting before being described as validated.

critical_supporting_extension_rules.critical: Packages whose skills have high prerequisite importance, standards centrality, dependency depth, instructional centrality, frequent later use, and necessary domain coverage after expert review.
critical_supporting_extension_rules.supporting: Packages that broaden, apply, extend, or contextualize critical skills and are important for instruction but not always gate-blocking by themselves.
critical_supporting_extension_rules.extension: Advanced/enrichment packages, if later identified, that extend beyond core grade expectations. Current empty extension package lists mean not_yet_reviewed, not reviewed_none_identified.
critical_supporting_extension_rules.not_by_title_only: Classification may not be based only on grade or title; future governance must review dependency evidence and standards.

grade_subject_frameworks.prerequisite_expectations: Prerequisites are inferred from prior-grade domain continuity and package dependency links only for planning; targeted earlier-grade confirmation occurs only after a specific weakness is found.
grade_subject_frameworks.instructional_dependencies: Use manifest-verified current packages and future sidecar prerequisite graph; unresolved non-manifest dependency links require review before automated sequencing.
assessment_claims_supported: domain-specific Mastered/Developing/Needs Support/Not Enough Evidence when future evidence rules are met
instructional priority areas
current-grade readiness after mastery gate evidence
assessment_claims_not_supported: scientifically validated thresholds at Phase Zero
single overall grade label that hides domain weaknesses
grade_subject_frameworks.break_recommendation: Offer a break by 35 minutes or earlier on fatigue; prefer domain/item-set boundaries.
grade_subject_frameworks.resume_behavior: Resume with remaining blueprint cells and unexposed equivalent items; do not change existing Skill World or Skill Practice progress behavior.
grade_subject_frameworks.audio_rules: Read Question and Listen are allowed when construct-appropriate, meaning-equivalent, recorded as accommodation/context, and never score-penalized or answer-revealing.
grade_subject_frameworks.accommodation_rules: Record accommodations for interpretation, do not penalize scores, and avoid demographic scoring adjustments.
grade_subject_frameworks.reading_load_constraints: Math reading should be no harder than needed for the construct; English passage load must match the assessed reading/writing construct and grade.
grade_subject_frameworks.visual_model_expectations: Visual models must be accessible, mobile-safe, interpretable with alt/support text, and not decorative when evidence depends on them.
grade_readiness_gate_requirements: current-grade mastery gate must be met before next-grade readiness
no unresolved critical prerequisite
domain-specific readiness retained
one strong domain cannot hide weakness in another
grade_subject_frameworks.extension_classification_note: No extension packages are identified in Phase Zero Part 2 because classification was generated from package metadata heuristics and has not completed expert review.

item_status_vocabulary.normalization_required: Blueprints must use only these canonical values; aliases such as practice_only, assessment_candidate, expert_reviewed, operational, field_tested, equivalent_form, and under_revision are not valid in this framework version.
item_status_vocabulary.field_test_rule: field_test items may be embedded only under a separately governed non-scored field-test design; field_test responses contribute zero weight to mastery, readiness, recommendations, placement, and parent-facing decisions.
